summary: Good‑sounding tape of a solid 1973 show with an outstanding He's Gone → Truckin' → Other One sequence and sweet jams throughout.
review: Both reviewers rate the performance around four stars, praising the youthful Jerry Garcia tone, a prime Phil jam, and great piano work. The highlight is the seamless He’s Gone → Truckin’ → The Other One → Eyes of the World → China Doll → Sugar Magnolia run, which they describe as “really outstanding” with generous jamming. No specific recording‑quality issues are mentioned, suggesting the source is at least listenable.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently positive 4‑star reviews focus on strong musical performance and note no recording problems; with only two detailed reviews confidence is medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers do not comment on soundboard or audience issues, implying the audio is acceptable and listenable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers highlight a flowing second‑set sequence with strong jams and smooth transitions, making the concert one of the better shows of 1973.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Sounds young and fresh on this night.
band_member_comments.Phil: Delivered a prime jam that stood out for reviewers.
band_member_comments.Keys: Great piano work noted throughout the show.
